name: chain_client_paid_me_1800_for_a_project_my_t
method:
client paid me $1800 for a project. my tool cost was $0.53. feeling like a goddamn genius rn ok so breakdown of my business economics:  
client project: landing page + contact form + chatbot client

stages.task: Scrape Upwork/Reddit/HN for clients needing landing pages, contact forms, chatbots. Filter: budget >$500, solo founder or small biz, no agency competition.
Generate personalized proposals using client brief. Highlight: 48hr turnaround, AI-powered quality, portfolio examples. Include fixed pricing ($800-2000 based on scope).
Use Claude Code to generate landing page + form + chatbot from client requirements. Deploy to Vercel/Surge. QA with Playwright.
Convert delivered project into case study, tweet thread, portfolio entry. Ask for referral. Upsell maintenance retainer ($200/mo).
